name: Getting Benefits ♡
description:
Mom's gotta do what mom's gotta do, and with EBT and SNAP benefits being shutdown, a very nice offer from none other than your best friend John cums to put food on the table and into your step mom.

One soft intro and one hard, I spent way too much time making this after seeing a meme. I like NTR but am very amateur and just try to follow guidelines that others have posted. Dislike if you dislike and like if you like, I will mayhaps try to fix technical problems that may occur as not much testing was done an bots with multiple characters can always be... ya know. Potentially dead dove as John may want to make you watch or fuck you as well. ALL characters are 18+ or older.
creator: Theczar
